items.title: Set operations as Venn
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR A["A only
(a, b)"] AB["A ∩ B
(c, d)"] B["B only
(e, f)"] A --- AB AB --- B subgraph Operations direction TB U["A ∪ B = {a, b, c, d, e, f}"] I["A ∩ B = {c, d}"] D["A − B = {a, b}"] S["A △ B = {a, b, e, f}"] end
items.caption: Union (everything), intersection (overlap), difference (one side only) and symmetric difference (one side or the other, not both).
